title: Claude Cowork comes to web and mobile with cloud-running tasks
friendlyTitle: Claude Cowork will work on phones, the web, and in the background
summary: Anthropic says Claude Cowork is rolling out to web and mobile, starting with Max users, so sessions can continue across devices. Cowork tasks can now keep running in the cloud, including scheduled work when no user device is online, while approval points still return to the user.
friendlySummary: Anthropic is bringing Claude Cowork to mobile and web. It can keep working in the cloud even when your laptop is closed, and it can ask you before important decisions.
whyItMatters: This pushes agent tools beyond desktop coding workflows into everyday knowledge work such as client preparation, contract review, reporting, and content operations. For users, the practical shift is from asking for answers in one sitting to supervising longer-running work across devices.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make AI feel more like a helper for real tasks, not just a chat box. You can start work in one place, check it later, and approve the final result.
